name: com.maxenceguidez.mxunikit.ui
description: Provides UI Toolkit foundations for a layered UI: an abstract PanelRenderer-based layer manager, a base view with show/hide lifecycle, a menu navigator with history, and a dialog stack manager.

samples.description: Code-first sample wiring MxMenuUiManager and MxOverlayUiManager with three menus (Home, Settings, Pause) and a confirmation dialog.
